item.title: Clearing some space
item.description:
My parents got my infant a zoo pass this year for Christmas. I gotta remember to send them this one.
The closest I've got is I believe a Yorker. But we're working on being quieter to not disturb the neighborhood
I say melk without thinking about it
I never bought one
My wife keeps rearranging the kitchen areas. It's hard to find things. But to be fair it usually makes sense why the baby food cabinet has changed.
Only been 10 months so far, but I think I get it
item.dc:creator: LamorAcanth

item.title: Why you don't brush curly hair:
item.description: Or maybe why you SHOULD brush curly hair. IDK your life and it kinda looks cool To be honest.

item.title: This poor kid lost 5 years of his life on a lie by the women who confessed the rape never happened.
item.description: He should have sued the women but he declined and chose to leave the past as the past. What a stand up young man.

item.title: A couple of foxes
item.description:
BONK
AAAAaaaaa
Sometimes you just don't know
It always is.
God I miss that.
item.dc:creator: WingRazor

item.title: This made me laugh loud enough to wake up the wife.
item.description: #humor#truth
item.dc:creator: ClutchPopper

item.title: Newest Painting!
item.description:
This is my newest painting. I wanted to give my baby Pothos plant something to aspire to! I am super happy with how it came out.
It took me approximately 30 hours to complete. I would love find a way to make my art a business eventually. Edit: Omg I am so blown away with all this support. Thank you all so much! I have ADHD and art is the only way I can focus and actually work on something without losing my mind. This has been a amazing day and I am so happy. Edit #2. FRONT PAGE?!?! WHAT IS THIS MADNESS! I might be happy crying. Thank you so much. (originally posted by @GhostOfZelda on 2021-02-12 00:57:56)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: Next level backing up skills
item.description: I think my dad would have watched this on repeat for half an hour, then show it to his friends all like; now this is how I try to tell my son to do it but he keeps turning the steering wheel the wrong way.
item.dc:creator: drestinblack

item.title: Phone dump number the tenth
item.description: Welcome, children, to this hall of memes and other dumb shit. Write on the walls if you wish.
item.dc:creator: MrCrazieman

item.title: Curated memes I enjoy
item.description:
Crime and a whole lot of free time
I have a “milestone” birthday next week. People are annoyed that I don’t want to celebrate/ do anything but for the past 5 years the people “closest” to me have forgotten in way or another. I go all out for their birthdays, but it’s never returned (not the point - but even a happy birthday would suffice).
Cat tax - Zari is the blue Russian, and Cleo is the Siamese. They are as ridiculously cute in person, and love people, but they’re needy and cheeky asf. Zari will steal the food out of your hands if you’re not careful enough, and Cleo likes to rip the heads off of plush toys then play “fetch” with the decapitated heads.
item.dc:creator: rosesblah

item.title: Impressive
item.dc:creator: WeirdAlisMySpiritUserName

item.title: All 3 of my dogs who I no longer have:(
item.description: Long story short, split up with ex. 2 days before she moved back to Ohio, my Samantha girl passed. Henry was my boy, and Sophie was my ex's, but Henry couldn't handle being alone since he's never been alone his whole life, so I made the decision to let my ex have Henry so he could be with Sophie. Now it's just little old me all by myself. It tears me up every day. I miss my dogs!! Edit: so much love, and my first front page!! Does that mean I get boob pics now?!!! Anyways, thank you all for this. Made my morning! Have an awesome day and love all of those fur babies!
item.dc:creator: stripp1

item.dc:creator: Tomboclaat

item.title: Just a small vent
item.description: Just need to vent, feel free to downvote into oblivion. Not asking for anything, just need to get this off my chest. tldr; at bottom. My daughter, according to every specialist we went to, wasn't supposed to live a single year, let alone 10. It's been one hell of a ride with bi-weekly to monthly hospital visits for the last 10 years. She's missing part of her brain and has Hydrocephalus. I am so proud of how far she's come and the struggles she's overcome. I was hoping to be able to do something for the big 1-0 for her, but its not to be. I have been trying to get through to the department of children and families for the last week and half to renew my food stamps, though I am on the phone all day I still can't get through and voicemail is full when I try to leave one. On top of that, fighting with social security for my wifes disability which they tried to deny upon review, and even though we appealed and said we wanted to continue payments they refused that part, so we barely have enough to cover the bills. It's been one hell of a last few months but we have made it by. Of all the timings for everything to go to be delayed, I just with it happened after her birthday. She deserves so much more. I'm doing what I can and all, but I can't help but feel like I am failing her. tldr; Daughter is turning 10 tomorrow and I can't afford a thing for her. No presents, no cake. Update: holy fuck. Yall just got her so much...I'm at a loss for words. Thank you all so damn much. Second Update: I am just completely overwhelmed. A second list was asked for and within minutes yall got everything on that one too. This is ended up being her biggest bday ever, thanks to all of you. I am at a complete loss for words, but thank you so much everyone. Another update: You guys have gotten her so much and keep asking to get her more. I'm actually in tears from being overwhelmed. Working on adding more to the list. She woke up to get a drink and said she wanted games for her switch so adding those, so gift cards work too. And for those who have been asking for it Paypal/ Email for giftcards- gmdaemon@outlook.com Venmo and cashapp are both GMDaemon So I misread the date last night when I posted this, thought my PC said it was the 16th and not the 10th. Everyone's present should be here on time, and I promise to upload all the pictures I can!
item.dc:creator: TrappedDM

item.title: This hurts more than I thought.
item.description: An angel on Earth. Maui.
item.dc:creator: CATdroid88

item.title: Bird Fall in Mexico
item.description:
Chihuahua.- A video began to circulate on social networks in which hundreds of migratory birds can be seen crashing into the ground in Cuauhtémoc, Chihuahua. The flock was located on Aldama Avenue and First Street, in the downtown area of ​​the city. Video recorded on Monday around 05:00. According to local media, the residents of the sector, seeing the strange behavior of the birds, spoke to the authorities. At least 100 dead migratory birds of the Yellow-headed Thrush (Xanthocephalus) species were found at the site. The birds migrate from northern Canada to northern Mexico where they spend the winter. Sauce: https://abcnoticias.mx/nacional/2022/2/10/captan-momento-en-que-mueren-decenas-de-aves-en-chihuahua-156556.html
sauce: https://twitter.com/CapitanFuria13/status/1491647836672303110 Discussion: https://www.reddit.com/r/WTF/comments/spfe99/huge_group_of_birds_falling_down_from_sky_what/hwfwq7l/ When raptors like peregrine falcons or merlins are chasing certain bird species like starlings, the prey species literally "flock" together into a huge group called a murmuration. The movement of the murmuration is controlled by something called "scale-free correlation". https://www.allaboutbirds.org/news/how-do-starling-flocks-create-those-mesmerizing-murmurations/ Basically, each bird reacts to the movement of the bird next to it, but there is no leader of the flock or central direction. So it is possible for a murmuration to flee so vigorously from a falcon on one side that the individual responses of the birds accumulate through the crowd to blow out the other side of the murmuration in a death dive. https://www.bbc.com/news/uk-wales-51880855 With behavior this complex, it's pretty common to have a glitch in the murmuration. It's generally fine...unless they happen to be very close to a solid object. But hey, easy pickings.
item.dc:creator: psuedon

item.title: Random Dump of Stolen Internets 2
item.description:
Oops. Sorry for the double!
We have a specific thrift shop in my town I recommend to visitors who would like a cursed object. Everyone always finds something.
Sorry for the uncropped cat tax!
Cat tax 2 because my last post didn't have one

item.dc:creator: BrownEydUserNotARobot30

item.title: A week’s ration for one person during World War 2 (UK)
item.description: I was born in the 70s, so never really understood how tight the rations were. 1oz (28 grams) of cheese a week? I get through half a kilo in days ... love cheese on toast, jacket potato with cheese, etc. I get through two eggs each lunchtime, so that's five months supply a week. Whoopsie. No wonder so many people kept their own chickens, etc.
item.dc:creator: chrisjlocke
